name: paper-introduction-analyzer
description: Analyze English paper Introductions with detailed structure, gap, tense, and writing-pattern guidance.

interface.shortDescription: 精读英文论文 Introduction 的结构、Gap、时态和句型。
interface.longDescription: A Chinese-language academic writing assistant for close reading English paper Introductions. It breaks down paragraph-level structure, research significance, research content, gaps, tense use, functional sentence patterns, logical transitions, and transferable writing strategies.
defaultPrompt: 分析这篇英文论文 Introduction 的写作结构。
帮我拆解 Introduction 的 gap 和功能句型。
精读这段引言并给出写作借鉴。
